passwordReset.subject: Reset Password
passwordReset.body: You are receiving this email because we received a password reset request for your account.
passwordReset.expiry: This link will expire in 1 hour.
passwordReset.ignore: If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email.

emailVerification.subject: Verify Email
emailVerification.body: Thank you for signing up! Please click the button below to verify your email address.
emailVerification.expiry: This link will expire in 24 hours.

welcome.subject: Welcome
welcome.body: Thank you for signing up for our service!
